name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-8
title: agents/tdd-subagent.md describes 9-step list but is decoupled from dispatch-tdd-subagent.py prompt template
description: agents/tdd-subagent.md describes the 9 steps as a list in prose but the actual step instructions are assembled at dispatch time by dispatch-tdd-subagent.py. If the agent definition's step list drifts from the prompt's banner names, the agent file becomes misleading documentation. Either inline the canonical step names into a single source (e.g., a constant in dispatch-tdd-subagent.py imported elsewhere), or generate the agent definition from the prompt template. Currently both files have a chance to drift independently.

history.note: superseded by CONTRACT-BACKLOG-1 (collapses into versioned schema-based subagent prompt contract; per cluster analysis 2026-05-18, this concern becomes trivial or free once the prompt is a structured contract with inspect/edit surface)
